expectations.text: The output is a complete HTML file starting with <!DOCTYPE html>
The file contains a headline with expert title and conspiracy/dramatic claim
Contains major narrative sections: Moment Everything Broke, billion lie, why everything failed, simple truth, discovery, self-test, patient revolution
Product LumiGlow Collagen Serum is named in the product introduction section
All 4 ingredients mentioned: Marine Collagen Peptides, Astaxanthin, Peptide Complex GF-7, Ceramide NP
The file contains a pricing section mentioning $49
The file contains a 120-day guarantee section
The file contains a Facebook-style comments section with at least 5 comments
JavaScript for sticky bar is embedded
The file contains a Two Paths section with PATH 1 and PATH 2
The file contains a footer with medical/FDA disclaimer
